ESP32-C3 Firmware Flasher

1️⃣ Connect ESP32-C3 via USB
2️⃣ Hold BOOT button → tap RESET
3️⃣ Click Flash below
4️⃣ Select USB port → Wait for completion
⚠️ Use Chrome or Edge browser ⚠️ HTTPS required
📥 Download .bin Files
